user.title: Plant API (optional)
user.description:
Agribuddy now uses a built-in plant variety database (1,900+ varieties). The Verdantly API key is optional — only needed if you want to fall back to their API for varieties not in the database.

Leave blank to skip.

weather.title: Pick your weather entity
weather.description: Choose any HA entity that surfaces current weather. Agribuddy reads its state for rain/snow detection and its attributes for frost forecasting.

farmos.title: FarmOS Integration (optional)
farmos.description:
Connect to a FarmOS instance to sync plants and events. Plants added in Agribuddy will be registered as plant assets in FarmOS.

Leave all fields blank to skip.

ai_provider.title: AI Fallback Provider (optional)
ai_provider.description:
Configure an OpenAI-compatible API as a fallback for plant varieties not found in the built-in database. Any endpoint that supports chat completions works (OpenAI, Ollama, LM Studio, etc.).

Leave blank to skip.

error.farmos_connect_failed: Could not connect to FarmOS. Check the URL, username, and password. Make sure the Simple OAuth Password Grant module is enabled.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — see HA logs for details.
